title: [FIRRTL] Parser Accepts Duplicated Names Under Layerblock
body:
The following should be illegal, but is currently parsed:

``` firrtl
FIRRTL version 4.0.0
circuit Foo:
  layer A, bind:
  public module Foo:

    layerblock A:
      wire a: UInt<1>

    wire a: UInt<1>
```

If the `layerblock` is moved _after_ the second wire definition, then the correct error is produced.
